infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Momentum uses the camera to scan meals and estimate calories and macros.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Momentum uses the microphone so you can describe meals naturally while logging food.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Momentum can read sleep and nutrition data to keep your daily rhythm in sync.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Momentum can write selected wellness data back to Health when you confirm it.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Momentum uses notifications for gentle morning and evening check-ins.
